title: The Island Fears Humans
description: On pages 10–13, this part follows Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Jinbe, Fish-Men, Luffy, Nami. The core story beat is the island fears humans.
scene: The scene centers on the island fears humans, with Narrator, Unknown person #1, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Jinbe, Fish-Men, Luffy, Nami driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PRINCE FUKABOSH!! It'S Hammond, FROM THE FISH- MAN DISTRICT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You can just lie there! Let your blood flow out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...until you perish helpless on these shores...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For there is an ancient law in this land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Thou shalt never share thy blood with humankind"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And you humans have only yourselves to blame!!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Throughout the Annals of History... you have feared our kind as monsters... and stubbornly refused to ever mingle your own blood with ours!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Even the death of this island's hero, Fisher Tiger, speaks against you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: that man, who risked his life to free all slaves, regardless of race...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...was gravely injured in the bloody battle that followed! With a little blood, his life could easily have been saved, but it was not to be!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: for the heartless humans refused to share their blood... and so he perished!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Thanks for the

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: So it's time you gave up on the life of that one Measly crewmate... and came with us to the fishman district!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: The captain of the new fishman pirates, hordy Jones-sama...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Has summoned you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You guys... I don't care if there's some law against it, I'm begging you!!! Isn't there anyone here with type s rh-negative blood?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We'll do anything you want in return!! Just please, help us to save his life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll take you by force if I have to...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of ASE AME!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...we're not listening...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought I told you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...to your demands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jet pistol!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just took out Hammond and his cronies, from the fish- man district.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Behind you - a sea monster!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Someone remember someone who

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sea monster... just gave up without even fighting...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What on earth...?! luffy-chan's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Impressive...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Luffy-Chilin!! You GUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?!

summary: The Island Fears Humans. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
